capabilities: 250 ms debounced persistence after field and state changes
immediate lifecycle flush on pagehide, beforeunload, and app backgrounding
automatic startup restore of current snapshot
fallback restore from previous snapshot when current snapshot is invalid
manual Restore Previous Autosave control with current/previous swap
pre-export checkpoints for Game File, Excel, PDF, and pitch log
game data remains on screen after file operations
explicit reset is required to erase browser recovery data
